query: intentional camera movement ICM abstract blurred photography painterly
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: ICM intentional camera movement, painterly abstract blur

response.objective_caption: An out-of-focus image showing soft circular bokeh light effects in muted green, yellow, and brown tones, with no discernible subjects or identifiable objects.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extremely out-of-focus image where all detail has dissolved into soft circular bokeh light effects in muted green, yellow, and brown tones, with no discernible subjects, representing an abstract photograph where representational clarity is entirely abandoned in favor of pure color, texture, and gestural blur.
